title: Introduce sphinx processing for html API web site
body:
* Add docs target to Makefile
* Started updating some docstrings
* Added support for connections from containers.conf
* Ported more uses of XDG_* envvar to xdg package
* Downgrade modules in requirements.txt as needed by RHEL/Fedora
  packaging.

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body: @jnovy I believe these package versions will work for you. See [requirements.txt](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/85/files#diff-4d7c51b1efe9043e44439a949dfd92e5827321b34082903477fd04876edb7552R3). /cc @lsm5
Thanks @jwhonce . I'll create scratch builds for @jnovy to test
@mwhahaha Thanks for the quick turn around!
@jwhonce could you cut a new release with this please?
hmm, setup.cfg still says urllib3 1.26.4. Intentional?

> Downgrade modules in requirements.txt as needed by RHEL/Fedora packaging.

This sounds like it's not a hard requirement of the package but to help the RHEL packages - conda-forge does not have this limitation, so I'm not planning to lower the urllib pin...
